{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231727310D25D4520F1CC29E9443"}"},"total":74},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7339558545934402328","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不知道说什么，但是确实好看，入股不亏，但是有一点不好就是两个人之间的感情摩擦有点激烈，但是问题不大，整体来讲是不虐滴[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708876035,"group_id":"7273822303031397436","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"粟米是一个百合写手，还没想好再何处安家的写手嘿嘿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6dfB9vCgzICQnbhrX4Y3/cFO5Io0stdJTm5qYV1FXjA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/46ab3bf239ff4c05b4172181d7d2ccda~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790830&x-signature=vAj5bjHrifMe%2BUMkhSszOA6K2K8%3D","user_id":"1891575365633020","user_name":"粟米是个百合作者呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1891575365633020","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7273822303031397436","book_info":{"abstract":"白双拖着疲惫的身体回到家，以为等待她的是需要哄的邵子瑜，没想到却是邵子瑜的“动作名场面”。
违背家族联姻，放弃所有追寻的真爱，短短两年就让她万劫不复。
她一直以为余司用肮脏的手段逼迫她联姻，却没成想余司一直在背地里保护她。
一朝身死，她发现自己回到了被余司提亲的那天。
她决定这辈子生是余司的人，死是余司的鬼.....
背景：同性相恋自由。
